name: opendesign
description: Open-source, skills-based version of Claude Design (claude.ai/design). HTML pages, slide decks, interactive prototypes, UI kits, and brand systems.

interface.shortDescription: A senior designer for your coding agent — decks, prototypes, UI kits, brand systems.
interface.longDescription: OpenDesign is an open-source, skills-based version of Claude Design (claude.ai/design). It turns your coding agent into a senior designer: intake questions, context-matching, taste discipline, and a verifier pass on the output. Ships eight skills covering wireframes, interactive prototypes, slide decks, design systems, and developer handoff.
defaultPrompt: Make a pitch deck for a seed-stage company, 10 slides.
Design a settings page for this app using our existing design system.
I want to explore a few options for the onboarding flow. Rough sketches, nothing polished yet.
